titleStmt.title: SII 38.344: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 344. (A.R. No. 344 of 1912.) ŚŌḺAPURAM, VELLORE TALUK, NORTH ARCOT DISTRICT. On a stone lying in the premises of a ruined Śiva temple.

p.hi: King: Parakēsarivarman Rājēndrachōḻa I Year 20: 1032 A.D.

summary.p: This is fragmentary. Begins with the meykīrtti of the ruler which is badly damaged and contains only a portion of it. It registers a sale of 14,000 kuḻi of land, by the nagaram to the Mahādēvar temple at Paṅgaḷa-nāḍu in Jayaṅkoṇḍachōḷa-maṇḍalam after the receipt of both the price-money and tax-money, as iṟaiyili-dēvadānam. Other details are lost.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
Iruttiya cempoṟṟirut taku muṭiyum payaṅkoṭukapaḻimi mucaṅkiyil mutukiṭṭoḷicca cayaciṅkaṉaḷap perumpuka
ṇṭuāṟRead ṇaṭāṟkoṇṭa kopparakesaripatmarāṉa śrīrājentra coḻatevaṟku yāṇṭu 2 10 Āvatu jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattup paṅkaḷa nāṭṭu vaṭakkil vakaimu
Eṅka(ka)vūr mahādevar vaṉattupiṭār śrīkāriyakaṭaikkāṇakiḻān Ātiśaṇḍeśvarkku Iṉnakarattom Iṟaiyilitevatānamāka viṟṟukkuṭutta nilam Āvatu
kkum nirkovaiykkum merkkum teṉpāṟkkellaiy celvankeṇikku vaṭakkum melpākkellaiy Erikaraikku kiḻakkum vaṭapārk ke
m patiṉaṟucāṇkolāl patinālāyiram kuḻiyum Iṟaidṛ(ra)vyamum vilaidṛ(ra)vyamum Aṟakkoṇṭu Eriyum Erikkuppāyum vāykkālum niruIncomplete.
Digital edition of SII 38.344 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
